hero.heading: Turning Data into Intelligent Insights
hero.subheading: Python-driven Data Analyst specializing in data analysis, machine learning, and real-world problem solving

about.text: Python-focused Data Analyst with hands-on experience in exploratory data analysis, machine learning, and data visualization. Built multiple real-world projects including predictive models and business dashboards. Strong in problem-solving and passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful insights.

projects.title: HR Attrition Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed HR data to predict employee turnover and identified key factors influencing attrition rates.

projects.title: Sales Dashboard with Forecasting
projects.description: Built an interactive visualization dashboard providing future sales projections based on historical data.

projects.title: AI Resume Parser
projects.description: Developed an NLP-based resume parser to extract key skills and validate candidate profiles efficiently.

projects.title: FIFA Player Analysis
projects.description: Exploratory data analysis of FIFA player statistics to identify high-potential talents.

projects.title: Salary Analysis
projects.description: Explored factors contributing to salary bumps and built predictive models for compensation analysis.
projects.metrics: High R2 score on test set
